variants: Parisa Kamali holds the professional license of Volcanic Therapist Approval and has carved out a unique niche in her field. She was guided in her academic journey by her mentor, Tinatin Chkhaidze, whose support was invaluable. Parisa's research has been featured in the Jade Anthem Journals, showcasing her contributions to volcanic therapy. In addition to her professional endeavors, she serves as the Outreach Chair for Driftpine Collective, playing a significant role in community engagement. Her work is supported by the Nightstar Creativity Board, which provides her primary funding source.
